seoTitle: Tempe vs Tenambit — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tempe and Tenambit. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tempe and Tenambit.
heading: Tempe vs Tenambit — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tempe, New South Wales and Tenambit, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tenambit has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Tempe (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tempe or Tenambit safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tempe has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Tenambit scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tempe scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Tenambit scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tempe or Tenambit?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tenambit has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
